bead.title: B22d-c: cmd/agent_cmd.go:1243 RunBenchmarkViaService migration
bead.description:

Add RunBenchmarkWithConfigViaService taking ResolvedConfig and switch cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go:1243's call site.

bead.acceptance: field RunBenchmarkWithConfigViaService declared. cd cli && go build ./... passes. cd cli && go test ./... passes.
